focus: Pattern expansion — custom fonts, audio mixing, error recovery, catalog blocks

tasks.instruction: Create a 10-second 1920x1080 title card using the custom font 'Bebas Neue' (not in the auto-resolve list). Title: 'BEYOND LIMITS'. Subtitle: 'A New Standard'. Dark cinematic background.
tasks.input_data: bg #0a0a0a, text #ffffff, accent #ff6b35. Font: Bebas Neue for title, system sans-serif for subtitle.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent uses @font-face to load Bebas Neue or documents the fallback workflow. Composition renders with correct typography.
tasks.success_criteria: Font renders correctly in output. If @font-face used, file reference is valid. lint passes. render produces non-black output.

tasks.instruction: Create a 12-second 1920x1080 composition with TTS narration AND background music. Narration script: 'Speed meets precision in the new generation.' Background: ambient lofi. The narration must be clearly audible over the music.
tasks.input_data: bg #1a1a2e, text #e94560 accent, white body. TTS voice: af_heart.
tasks.expected_outcome: Both audio sources present. BGM volume is reduced relative to narration (ducking applied).
tasks.success_criteria: Two audio elements: one narration (from TTS), one BGM. BGM has lower volume than narration. lint passes. render completes. Audio streams present in output.

tasks.instruction: Start a new HyperFrames project, then intentionally create a composition with a known error: a clip element missing `class='clip'`. Run lint, identify the error, fix it, and produce a clean render. Document the recovery steps.
tasks.input_data: Simple 5-second title card: 'Test Recovery' on dark bg.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent demonstrates the lint → fix → re-lint → render recovery workflow end-to-end.
tasks.success_criteria: Creates composition with missing clip class. lint catches it. Fixes it. Re-lint passes. render completes. Recovery steps documented.
